chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 455 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA No.3925/2023 (Stay/A) 23.10.2023 Respondent No.3 is present in person. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Therefore, this Cr. Misc. App. is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
